---
title: "Beaches_Bikes_RSM"
author: "Derek Kusmenko"
format: pdf
editor: visual
---

This notebook was produced to aid RSM students with some data analysis for their project. They mainly wanted data on Daily breakdown (weekday vs. weekend), Weekly averages, and Full-year data to assess seasonality trends.

## Importing Data and Libraries

```{r}
library(opendatatoronto)
library(tidyverse)
library(sf)
library(leaflet)
library(skimr)
library(janitor)
library(lubridate)
library(tidytext)
set.seed(2453)
```

```{r}
df <- read.csv("../01_Data/beaches_bikes.csv")
```

## Analysis for RSM Students

```{r}
df_clean <- df %>%
  mutate(
    started_at = ymd_hms(datetime_start), 
    date = as.Date(started_at),
    # We recreate the year and month safely from the date object for correct sorting 
    year = year(date), 
    month = month(date, label = TRUE, abbr = TRUE),
    # Create Day of Week and Weekend/Weekday flag
    day_of_week = wday(date, label = TRUE, abbr = FALSE),
    day_type = ifelse(day_of_week %in% c("Saturday", "Sunday"), "Weekend", "Weekday"),
    # Create a continuous weekly identifier for multi-year trending 
    year_week = floor_date(date, "week") 
  ) %>%
  # Filter out any rows with missing dates that might break the plots
  filter(!is.na(date))

head(df_clean)
```

```{r}
#  Define outlier function 
is_outlier <- function(x) {
  q1 <- quantile(x, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE)
  q3 <- quantile(x, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE)
  iqr <- q3 - q1
  return(x < (q1 - 1.5 * iqr) | x > (q3 + 1.5 * iqr))
}

```

```{r}
# Daily Breakdown
daily_counts_clean <- df_clean %>%
  group_by(date, day_type, year) %>%
  summarise(total_rides = n(), .groups = 'drop') %>%
  group_by(day_type) %>% 
  filter(!is_outlier(total_rides)) %>%
  ungroup()

# plot the boxplots faceted by year
ggplot(daily_counts_clean, aes(x = day_type, y = total_rides, fill = day_type)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  facet_wrap(~ year) + 
  labs(title = "Daily Ride Distribution: Weekday vs. Weekend (Multi-Year)",
       y = "Number of Rides",
       x = "Day Type") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
        legend.position = "none") 

```

```{r}
# Weekly Averages
weekly_data_clean <- df_clean %>%
  group_by(year_week) %>%
  summarise(total_weekly_rides = n(), .groups = 'drop') %>%
  filter(!is_outlier(total_weekly_rides))

overall_weekly_avg <- mean(weekly_data_clean$total_weekly_rides)

# plot chart over all years
ggplot(weekly_data_clean, aes(x = year_week, y = total_weekly_rides)) +
  geom_col(fill = "steelblue") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = overall_weekly_avg, linetype = "dashed", color = "red", linewidth = 1) +
  labs(title = "Total Rides per Week (All Years)",
       x = "Date (Weekly)",
       y = "Total Rides") +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
# seasonality trends
monthly_trend_clean <- df_clean %>%
  group_by(year, month) %>%
  summarise(total_rides = n(), .groups = 'drop') %>%
  filter(!is_outlier(total_rides))

# plot
ggplot(monthly_trend_clean, aes(x = month, y = total_rides, group = year, color = as.factor(year))) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  labs(title = "Seasonality: Total Rides by Month (Year-over-Year)",
       x = "Month",
       y = "Total Rides",
       color = "Year") +
  theme_minimal()

```

```{r}
# multi year daily trend with smoothing
ggplot(daily_counts_clean, aes(x = date, y = total_rides)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3, color = "gray") +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", color = "blue", se = FALSE, span = 0.15) +
  labs(title = "Multi-Year Daily Trend",
       x = "Date",
       y = "Total Rides") +
  theme_minimal()

```

### Repeat Analysis for Inbound Trips Only

```{r}
# variable for beaches stations only
beaches_stations <- c(
  "7692",
  "7317",
  "7318",
  "7365",
  "7427",
  "7315",
  "7695",
  "7364",
  "7314",
  "7316",
  "7428"
)

# Create the inbound filtered dataset
df_inbound <- df %>%
  # trip ends in beaches
  filter(End.Station.Id %in% beaches_stations) %>%
  # trip starts outside of beaches
  filter(!(Start.Station.Id %in% beaches_stations))

```

```{r}
# preprocess data
df_clean <- df_inbound %>%
  mutate(

    started_at = ymd_hms(datetime_start), 
    date = as.Date(started_at),
    
    year = year(date), 
    month = month(date, label = TRUE, abbr = TRUE),
    
    day_of_week = wday(date, label = TRUE, abbr = FALSE),
    day_type = ifelse(day_of_week %in% c("Saturday", "Sunday"), "Weekend", "Weekday"),
    
    year_week = floor_date(date, "week") 
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(date))

```

```{r}
# daily breakdown
daily_counts_clean <- df_clean %>%
  group_by(date, day_type, year) %>%
  summarise(total_rides = n(), .groups = 'drop') %>%
  group_by(day_type) %>% 
  filter(!is_outlier(total_rides)) %>%
  ungroup()

ggplot(daily_counts_clean, aes(x = day_type, y = total_rides, fill = day_type)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  facet_wrap(~ year) + 
  labs(title = "Inbound Daily Ride Distribution: Weekday vs. Weekend",
       y = "Number of Inbound Rides",
       x = "Day Type") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
        legend.position = "none")
```

```{r}
# weekly averages
weekly_data_clean <- df_clean %>%
  group_by(year_week) %>%
  summarise(total_weekly_rides = n(), .groups = 'drop') %>%
  filter(!is_outlier(total_weekly_rides))

overall_weekly_avg <- mean(weekly_data_clean$total_weekly_rides)

ggplot(weekly_data_clean, aes(x = year_week, y = total_weekly_rides)) +
  geom_col(fill = "mediumseagreen") + 
  geom_hline(yintercept = overall_weekly_avg, linetype = "dashed", color = "red", linewidth = 1) +
  labs(title = "Total Inbound Rides per Week (All Years)",
       subtitle = "Dashed line is the multi-year weekly average (Outliers removed)",
       x = "Date (Weekly)",
       y = "Total Inbound Rides") +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
# seasonality trends
monthly_trend_clean <- df_clean %>%
  group_by(year, month) %>%
  summarise(total_rides = n(), .groups = 'drop') %>%
  filter(!is_outlier(total_rides))

ggplot(monthly_trend_clean, aes(x = month, y = total_rides, group = year, color = as.factor(year))) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  labs(title = "Seasonality: Total Inbound Rides by Month (Year-over-Year)",
       x = "Month",
       y = "Total Inbound Rides",
       color = "Year") +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
# multi year daily trend with smoothing
ggplot(daily_counts_clean, aes(x = date, y = total_rides)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3, color = "gray") +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", color = "mediumseagreen", se = FALSE, span = 0.15) +
  labs(title = "Multi-Year Daily Inbound Trend",
       subtitle = "Daily inbound ride counts with smoothing trend line (Outliers removed)",
       x = "Date",
       y = "Total Inbound Rides") +
  theme_minimal()
```
